title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
summary: Grabette是一个用于记录机器人操作数据的开放系统，旨在简化数据采集流程，支持多种传感器和机器人平台，并提供标准化数据格式以促进研究共享。
highlights: Grabette provides an open system for recording robot manipulation data.
It supports multiple sensors and robot platforms.
The system uses a standardized data format to facilitate sharing and reproducibility.
